Package org.eventb.pptrans.tests

Class TranslationTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.pptrans.tests.AbstractTranslationTests
org.eventb.pptrans.tests.TranslationTests
public class TranslationTests extends AbstractTranslationTests
Ensures that the translator from set-theory to predicate calculus works correctly.

    void
    testBug3489973()
    Ensures that bug #3489973: "NPE in pp trans" is fixed (original predicate from the bug report).
    void
    testBug3489973Equal()
    Ensures that a functional image that hides a maplet is properly translated when occurring in an equality predicate.
    void
    testBug3489973Reduced()
    Ensures that bug #3489973: "NPE in pp trans" is fixed (reduced predicate found while investigating).

      public void testFALSE_9()

    • testBug3489973

      public void testBug3489973()
      Ensures that bug #3489973: "NPE in pp trans" is fixed (original predicate from the bug report).

    • testBug3489973Reduced

      public void testBug3489973Reduced()
      Ensures that bug #3489973: "NPE in pp trans" is fixed (reduced predicate found while investigating).

    • testBug3489973Equal

      public void testBug3489973Equal()
      Ensures that a functional image that hides a maplet is properly translated when occurring in an equality predicate.

    • testMathExtension

      public void testMathExtension()
      Ensure that mathematical extensions get discarded by the translation.

    • testSequent

      public void testSequent()
      Ensures that all predicates of a sequent get translated.
